attacking_style: Not a primary attacker. Functions as a positioning intermediary and pace-setter for team leaders, operating in the 30km-to-go zone and on minor climbs rather than decisive summit finishes.
team_tactics: Deployed as early-stage controller to soften opposition through sustained tempo on preliminary climbs. Bridges gaps for team leaders but exits before final decisive accelerations.
terrain_preference: Minor climbs and rolling terrain where sustained pace-making is valued. Struggles on steepest gradient ramps where pure climbing power determines outcomes.
vulnerability: Cannot follow or contribute once gradients steepen to maximum and GC contenders launch final accelerations. Effectiveness drops significantly in final decisive moments.
key_patterns: Positioned as tempo domestique on climbs 30+ km from finish, burning opposition riders (2 observations).
Serves as bridge/intermediary for team leaders during positioning phases before key climbs (2 observations).
Exits race influence when steepest gradients hit and final GC accelerations occur (2 observations).
form_trajectory: unknown: Limited observations show consistent domestique role without individual result focus across 2020 season
